violations.text: The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Menus are lacking allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
Handwashing sink at the bar was is lacking proper signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Working containers of food and drink purees were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The ice scoop at the bar is stored on an unclean surface (in direct contact with bottles of alcohol) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The dish machine located in the bar area was not in good repair, observed leaking during use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sinks. Inspector provided test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The dumpster area (shared with other tenants) was not maintained clean. Dumpster areas must be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the bar area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The wall next to 3 bay sink (bar area) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The walls above mop sink are constructed of wood (gaps in FRP). This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Ambient of freezer was 81 degrees Farenheit. PIC called for service. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the ware washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

The walls behind 3 bay sink (bar area) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

The shelving (air drying shelf) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
